para_trans: National Integration, Universal Fraternity and Thought Promotion Committee on the continuation of temporary posts.
Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance,
Madam Cama Road, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Government Decision No: Establishment-2015 / Q. No.27 / Aastha-9 / Part-I

Reference: 1) Government Decision, Social Welfare, Cultural Affairs and Sports Department No: SAI-1094 / P.No.20 / Mavak-1, D. 14/190/19994 2) Government Judgments, Social Justice, Cultural Affairs, Sports and Special Assistance Department No: SARAY-2002 / Q. No. 128 / Reforms-1, D. 21/09/2004 3) Government Decisions, Department of Finance, No: Ans. -1014 / Q. 12/2004 Financial Reforms -1, D. 19/08/2004 4) Government Decisions, Finance Department, No: Ans. 1014 / Q. 12 (Part-II) / 2004 / Fiscal Reforms-I, D. 04/10/2004 5) Government Judgments, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department No: SARAY-2002 / Q. 128 / Part-II / Reform-I, D. 16/12/2006 6) Government Corrigendum, Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance No: SARAY-2002 / Q. 128 / Part-II / Reform-I, D. 20/05/2007, d. 28/01/2008 and 27/01/2009 7) Government Decisions, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department No: Establishment-2010, No.100 / Aastha-1, D. 09/03/2010, d. 15/01/2011 and d. 23/01/2012 8) Government Judgment, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department No: Establishment-2012 / No.541 / Aastha-1, D. 31/12/2012, d. 03/01/2014 and d. 22/01/2014 9) Government Decision, Finance Department No. Post-2016, / Q. No. 8/16 / A. P.C.D. 18.8.2022 10) Government Decisions, Finance Department No. Posts-2016 / P.S. 8/16 APCCD 08.02.2023, D.S. 31.08.2023 b Government Script Serial Number, d. 06.09.2023, d. 21.02.2024, 06.09.2024, and 03.03.2025.
11) Government Judgments, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department No. - Establishment-2015 / Q. No.27 / Aastha-1 / Part-1, D. 23.09.2024 and d. 10.03.2025.
13) Government Decision, Finance Department No. Post-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. 26.08.2025.
14) Government Judgments, Social Justice and Special Assistance Department No. - Establishment-2015 / Q. No.27 / Aastha-1 / Part-1, D. 10.09.2025.
15) Government Decision, Finance Department No. Post-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. 28.02.2026.

The following temporary posts have been created for the functioning of the Committee on National Integration, Universal Fraternity and Promotion of Thought constituted under this Department. By Government Decision dated 10.06.2025. The deadline was extended from 01.09.2025 to 28.02.2026. Now Government Decisions, Finance Department
No. Post-2016, / P.S. 8/16 P.C.D. 28.02.2026 Subject to conditions, the following temporary posts are to be filled up. 01.03.2026 that is. This Government decision is being extended till 31.08.2026.

The expenditure in this regard shall be apportioned under the head "Demand No. N-2,2251-Secretariat-Social Services, 090-Secretariat, (05) Development Plan for National Integration and Universal Fraternity Enhancement, (05) (09) Development Plan for National Integration and Universal Fraternity Enhancement (2251-044-5), (Compulsory), 01-Payment" and shall be apportioned from the provision to be approved for the current year.

3. This Order is in accordance with the Government Decision, Finance Department No. Designation-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. The powers conferred on the administrative division under 28.02.2026 are being superseded and issued.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
